name: gaviota_odessa
description: The Tide Market (q.side_odessa slot 45) end-to-end: Nurse Coralie's rumor hub (the rumor button sets met_gaviota_nurse - the register gate that lights the find-the-fence stage - and rolls a 'Coralie, quietly:' town rumor), then Fence Odessa's guarded intro under the boardwalk (accept latches odessa_crate_started + THE TIDE MARKET title), the crate recovery (sidequest/odessa/recover_crate: one-shot guard, 150 CD finder token, odessa_crate_recovered, started latch cleared), and the open_shop unlock render ('See the tide market' -> OPEN_TRADING_SCREEN; render-assert ONLY per the wheat_war/mystic_mirror precedent - the trading screen class is unverified headless and the shop is not the quest surface). The customs-float crate prop is UNPLACED (register: interaction block at PLACEHOLDER ~[540 63 3530] still to be wired), so the recovery is rcon-dispatched as the player - the safari concierge precedent; convert to a real walk-up + interact.block once the prop lands. Nurse screen asserts target BUTTON labels only: the post_docks entry (cd_instability_gte_24, a live world score band) can preempt the default entry, and both carry the same heal/rumor buttons. No exact balance asserts (skewed payout rail + query abbreviation >= 1000); wallet rides +20000-ish per run.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks; the 40b latches spawn Coralie and Odessa on a fresh world). Coordinate is gaviota_nurse's authored placement - PLACEHOLDER y65, _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the Center floor --
-- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario sets, plus a generous fund (the tide market is a fee/shop surface) --

steps.comment_: band_tags must re-derive no_odessa_crate_recovered after the removal before Odessa's guarded default can gate in

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: nurse unmet, crate chain fully unwound --

-- beat 1: the rumor hub. post_docks (prio 25, cd_instability_gte_24) may preempt the default in a live world; BOTH entries carry the same heal + rumor buttons, so the asserts target labels, never say prose --

steps.expect_screen_text: What is the word on the docks?

steps.click: What is the word on the docks?

steps.comment_: every rumor roll and the fallback share the aqua 'Coralie, quietly: ' prefix - the one deterministic needle on a 1..5 roll
the register gate that lights the q.side_odessa find-the-fence stage

steps.comment: -- beat 2: the fence under the boardwalk - guarded intro + accept --

expect_screen_text: Easy. You are not customs - customs does not come down here alone. I move what the Company prices out of reach. That is not theft. Theft was the tariff. This is just the water correcting a bad ledger.
Want to trade? Prove you are on the tide side. Customs floated a seized crate off the far slip and left it bobbing as a warning. Bring it back and my slip is open to you.

steps.wait_chat: customs floated a seized crate off the far slip

steps.comment: -- beat 3: the crate. Prop UNPLACED (no interaction block wired yet; register keeps the PLACEHOLDER float coord ~[540 63 3530]), so the turn-in fires by rcon exactly as the prop would - as the player, one-shot guarded --

steps.comment_: recovered latched AND the started latch cleared

steps.comment: -- beat 4: the unlock. open_shop (prio 30) preempts the guarded default; 'See the tide market' rendering IS the assert - never clicked (OPEN_TRADING_SCREEN class unverified headless, wheat_war 'See the wares' precedent) --

steps.comment_: player has not moved since beat 2; re-find refreshes the approach context

expect_screen_text: You got the crate back off the float. Good. Then we are past introductions. This is what the tariff took and the tide returned - same goods, honest weight, no verified surcharge stapled on top.
Buy what you like. Half of it is bound for the desert road anyway - Dunewind takes everything the port is not allowed to sell here. Funny how the things they overtax always find the water.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip every tag this scenario set so no other scenario inherits the lane --
